title: Mob Eggs Plus
body:
📰 Origin:

Mob Eggs+ was made by me with the intent on mob eggs being used in survival gameplay.
_________________________________________________________________________________________________________

⬇️ What Is This?:

Mob Eggs+ makes mob eggs craftable in recipes that would make sense with there respectable drops. If you want to see these recipes I would recommend you use modrinth.com/mod/jei.
_______________________________________________________________________________________

❔ Forge Port:

I'm currently researching how to port to Forge at the moment! There will be a link right here when it is done.
_____________________________________________________________________________________
